visual.name: smartFilterByOKViz
visual.description: Smart Filter by OKViz works like an observer, showing the current filters set in the report page, or like a slicer, allowing you to choose records from a drop-down list or search by typing a few letters.

observerMode.description: Observer mode show the filters applied to the bound measure in the page (max 100 items)
